title: Anna University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Anna University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
